25:13 â May 29, 2025
Update to the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
as described below.
The Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only.
Document Library
Status
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule
2725
Throughout
We removed the digital banking fees as Intellect Design has taken over the operations of digital banking and is responsible for communicating any changes to the fees. Note that there were no changes to the fees with the transition to Intellect Design. If you require further information on the digital banking fees, please contact your Intellect Client Partner or Digital Banking Support at:
Phone
: 1-888-889-7878, Option 2
Email
:
digitalbanking_support@central1.com
The title of the document was also updated.
Revised
Section 1.7, Drafts Fees (Canadian Dollars, US Dollars, and Foreign Currencies)
Convera updated the amount and structure of the monthly core platform fee for FX Drafts. This is effective June 1, 2025. See the
Payments Centre
for more information.

Fees
We removed the âOriginating Me-To-Meâ and the âOriginating My-Business-To-My-Businessâ fees. Central 1 no longer facilitates these real-time transactions. We also updated the title of this section.
Chapter 9, Token Fees
We updated the title of this chapter, as it now only includes token fees.
